news.t: GMO Launches GMO Domestic Resilience ETF (DRES)

holdings.infoBox: DRES is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are Union Pacific stock at 5.21%, WillScot Holdings at 3.77%, Carlisle Companies at 3.69%, Martin Marietta Materials at 3.68%, and Vulcan Materials Company at 3.57%.

overview.description: The GMO Domestic Resilience ETF (DRES) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking total returns through investments in US companies across all market capitalization. The fund targets those poised to benefit from the shift away from globalization and the acceleration of onshoring production and supply chains back to the US. DRES was launched on Oct 1, 2025 and is issued by GMO.

data.title: GMO Launches GMO Domestic Resilience ETF (DRES)
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--GMO Domestic Resilience ETF (DRES) invests in U.S. companies poised to benefit from the reshaping of America's industrial and economic landscape.
